text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before training, Gold City is getting an interview
for a magazine.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What I'm into? Well, I recently started practicing
yoga. I happen to know a good teacher.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I see. Just as expected, you're mindful of
maintaining your physique!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Um... It's more for relaxation and strengthening
my core.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, of course. With the amount of training you
do, I'm sure you don't have any trouble keeping
in shape!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That was too close. I would've been done for if I
told him the yoga was to complement my diet.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know... when I'm hanging out with
people like Jordan, I tend to overeat a little.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, this is embarrassing. I'll have reached my
goal soon, so don't tell anyone about the diet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, and perhaps thanks to the benefits of
doing yoga, Gold City regains her usual physique.
